channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding Vitamin B12: benefits, deficiency risks, and whether high levels are linked to cancer
item.description: Vitamin B12 (cobalamin) is an essential nutrient required for the production of red blood cells, proper functioning of the nervous system, and accurate DNA replication and repair. It is naturally foun...

item.title: Linus Torvalds Says AI Is Increasing Linux Kernel Development and Bug Reports
item.description: During the Linux Foundation's Open Source Summit North America, Linux creator Linus Torvalds discussed how artificial intelligence tools are changing Linux kernel development and bug discovery. Accord...

item.title: Authorities warn of potential blast impact zones at Garden Grove aerospace facility amid chemical tank crisis
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, California, have released new details outlining the potential impact zones if a damaged chemical tank at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove were to explode. According ...

item.title: McBurnie’s stoppage-time goal secures Hull City promotion to the Premier League after playoff final win
item.description: Hull City have secured a dramatic return to the English Premier League after defeating Middlesbrough 1-0 in the Championship playoff final held at Wembley Stadium. The decisive moment of the match cam...

item.title: Behind-the-scenes promotional stills of Mel Gibson as William Wallace in Braveheart (1995)
item.description: The article highlights a set of promotional still photographs featuring Mel Gibson in his role as William Wallace for the 1995 historical epic film “Braveheart.” The film, directed and produced by Gib...

item.title: Joshua Garcia shares discomfort with on-camera skin exposure, prefers modest roles
item.description: Actor Joshua Garcia has openly shared his personal comfort level when it comes to acting roles that require him to show more skin on camera. In a recent interview, he admitted that he finds such scene...

item.title: Damaged Chemical Tank in Orange County Prompts Mass Evacuations Amid Explosion Risk
item.description: Emergency crews in Orange County, Southern California, are responding to a hazardous situation involving a pressurized chemical tank that overheated at a GKN Aerospace facility in Garden Grove. The ta...

item.title: Florida Airport Licensing Deal Gives Trump Organization Control Over Branding and Merchandise Rights
item.description: Representative Mike Levin, a Democrat from California, criticized a controversial agreement involving the renaming of Palm Beach International Airport to President Donald J. Trump International Airpor...

item.title: Allegations of AI-generated entries spark debate in Commonwealth Short Story Prize 2026 results
item.description: A recent controversy surrounding the Commonwealth Short Story Prize 2026 has raised serious questions about the role of artificial intelligence in creative writing and literary awards. Allegations hav...

item.title: Tinubu Secures Landslide Victory in Edo APC Presidential Primary
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has recorded a sweeping victory in the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary conducted across Edo State. According to the official results announced, Tinubu ...

item.title: Electric conversions give classic cars a second life amid rising costs in Australia
item.description: Across Australia, a small but growing number of classic car enthusiasts are converting ageing petrol vehicles into electric cars, extending their lifespan while responding to rising fuel costs and bro...

item.title: Bureau of Immigration confirms no hold departure order issued against Senator Bato dela Rosa, only lookout bulletin in place
item.description: The Bureau of Immigration (BI) has clarified that there is currently no hold departure order (HDO) issued against Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, despite ongoing legal developments involving an arres...

item.title: How 1920s Women Adopted Jodhpurs as a Symbol of Freedom and Modern Style
item.description: The 1920s marked a major turning point in women’s fashion, as restrictive garments like corsets were increasingly abandoned in favor of clothing that allowed greater freedom of movement and self-expre...

item.title: South Korean submarine visit highlights competition for Canada's multibillion-dollar fleet replacement
item.description: A South Korean submarine built by Hanwha Ocean has arrived off the coast of British Columbia as part of an effort to demonstrate its capabilities to Canadian defence decision-makers. The ROKS Dosan Ah...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce attend Cavaliers vs Knicks Eastern Conference Finals game in Cleveland
item.description: Taylor Swift attended Game 3 of the NBA Eastern Conference Finals in Cleveland alongside her fiancé, NFL star Travis Kelce, as the Cleveland Cavaliers faced the New York Knicks at Rocket Arena. The ap...

item.title: U.S. House Committee Advances Bill to Make Daylight Saving Time Permanent
item.description: A proposal in the United States Congress to make daylight saving time permanent has taken a significant step forward, reigniting a long-running national debate over the biannual clock changes. The Hou...

item.title: Police and peace committee operation in Bannu leaves 25 terrorists dead, four others martyred
item.description: A major security operation was carried out in the Barakzai Akhundkhel area of Miryan tehsil in Bannu district after police and a local peace committee received intelligence regarding the presence of a...

item.title: IO Interactive unveils younger and more vulnerable James Bond in upcoming game 007 First Light
item.description: IO Interactive has revealed new details about 007 First Light, an upcoming James Bond video game that introduces a younger and less experienced version of the famous British spy. The game stars Irish ...

item.title: 1954 Alfa Romeo B.A.T. 7 Concept Car and Its Aerodynamic Design Legacy
item.description: The 1954 Alfa Romeo B.A.T. 7 is presented as the most visually striking and advanced of the Berlina Aerodinamica Tecnica concept cars created by designer Franco Scaglione for the Bertone coachworks. R...

item.title: White House briefly locked down after reports of gunfire near Washington intersection
item.description: The White House was temporarily placed under lockdown on Saturday evening after reports of gunfire near the intersection of 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue in Washington, D.C., an area located les...
